summary: A solid early‑80s show with lively playing and a decent listening experience, though reviewers give no specifics on the recording quality.
review: The three fans all rate this April 1982 Baltimore concert four stars, praising the fun vibe, strong set list and especially Jerry Garcia’s crisp early‑80s guitar tone. No technical details are offered about the audio source, but the overall impression is that the performance outweighs any recording ambiguities.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews highlight good musical performance; lack of recording comments keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not comment on sound clarity, mix balance or source type, implying no major issues were noticed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans note a great set list and an overall sense that the band was having fun, suggesting smooth pacing and enjoyable transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Two reviewers highlight Jerry’s early‑80s guitar tone as crisp and “perfect,” while noting his vocals were a bit rough at this point.
